projectDescription: An Android application that uses ReVanced Patcher to patch apps on-device, enabling users to download, customize, and apply patches to Android apps.
keyFeatures: Download apps automatically using the built-in downloader system
Patch Android apps by selecting and applying ReVanced patches on-device
Manage patched apps — view, re-patch, or uninstall
Manage patch bundles from remote URLs or local storage
Plugin-based downloader system with trust management
Import/export patch selections, patch options, and signing keystore
Automatic update checks for ReVanced Manager
Advanced safeguard settings for version compatibility
publicApiSurface: Downloader(name, block) — DSL function to define a downloader plugin
DownloaderScope.get(block) — Define the app lookup block
GetScope.requestStartActivity(intent) — Request user interaction via activity
GetScope.requestStartFragment(clazz, args) — Launch a fragment for user interaction
DownloaderScope.useService(intent, block) — Bind and use an Android service
UserInteractionException — Sealed class for downloader interaction errors
Scope.hostPackageName — Package name of ReVanced Manager
Scope.downloaderPackageName — Package name of the downloader
Scope.dataDir — Persistent data directory for the downloader
